---
pagetitle: "Skill Usage and Design"
title: "[Skill Usage and Design]{.amber}"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#2C3E50"
  data-background-image: figs/banner.png
  data-background-size: 24%
  data-background-position: right 20% center
  class: dark-centered
  style: text-align:left;
---

## Today {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/roadmap.qmd >}}

## [Without]{.coral} vs [with]{.teal} a skill {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/motivation.qmd >}}

## [Without]{.coral} vs [with]{.teal} a skill {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/motivation-image.qmd >}}

## What is a skill? {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/what-skill.qmd >}}

## Skill usage example: the <a class="waza-btn" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.open('https://github.com/tw93/Waza','_blank','noopener')">Waza</a> plugin {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/waza-skills.qmd >}}

## Let's use `/read` to summarize {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/read-demo.qmd >}}

## &nbsp; {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/practice-1.qmd >}}

## Let's create a skill! {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/skill-setup.qmd >}}

## Let's create a skill! {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/skill-authoring.qmd >}}

## Create symlinks {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/link-skills.qmd >}}

## A more sophisticated skill {.light-centered .center}



## Where to install skills from {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/install-sources.qmd >}}

## Keep it in a repo, symlink it in {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/install-symlink.qmd >}}

## &nbsp; {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/practice-2.qmd >}}

## The minimal skill {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/minimal-tree.qmd >}}

## Minimal in form, not in function {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/ph-prefix.qmd >}}

## Add templates and scripts {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/complex-structure.qmd >}}

## These slides were built with `/ph-slide` {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/workshop-built.qmd >}}

## Randomness vs determinism {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/determinism.qmd >}}

## Pinned down by a template and a script {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/seasoning.qmd >}}

## Nest another agent {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/nested-agents.qmd >}}

## One skill, many workflows {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/bundled.qmd >}}

## `/surveydown`: four workflows, one name {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/surveydown.qmd >}}

## &nbsp; {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/practice-3.qmd >}}

## Four shapes of a skill {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/takeaways.qmd >}}

## &nbsp; {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/for-humans.qmd >}}

## Up next {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/up-next.qmd >}}
